realm.name: CONTRACTOR
realm.description: Station owner - can manage stations and view analytics

realm.name: ADMIN
realm.description: System administrator - full access to all services and databases

realm.name: SPECIALIST
realm.description: Service specialist - can diagnose stations and view metrics

realm.name: USER
realm.description: Regular user - can charge at stations

passwordPolicy: length(8) and digits(1) and lowerCase(1) and upperCase(1) and specialChars(1) and notUsername(undefined) and notEmail(undefined)

clients.name: User Service
clients.description: Client for user authentication and management

policies.name: Default Policy
policies.description: A policy that grants access only for users within this realm

config.code:
// by default, grants any permission associated with this policy
$evaluation.grant();

policies.name: Default Permission
policies.description: A permission that applies to the default resource type

clientScopes.name: acr
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add acr (authentication context class reference) to the token

clientScopes.name: web-origins
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add allowed web origins to the access token

clientScopes.name: roles
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add user roles to the access token

Handle what to do if there is existing account with same email/username like authenticated identity provider
Flow to determine if the OTP should be reset or not. Set to REQUIRED to force.
Flow for the existing/non-existing user alternatives
Used by Docker clients to authenticate against the IDP
Actions taken after first broker login with identity provider account, which is not yet linked to any Keycloak account
